rationale: Keep: the citing note says the paper extends sales-force incentive research and addresses limited guidance on disincentives/threats, while the cited paper is a randomized field experiment on sales compensation that directly tests quota bonuses and punitive framing (10.1509/jmr.15.0174). Given this strong construct overlap (incentives vs punitive/disincentive mechanisms in salesperson performance), the citation is plausibly a substantive theory/comparison source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
